## What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `contracts/`: `npx hardhat test` passes (added/updated tests for new behavior)
- [ ] `web/`: `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean and `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Focused on one concern; no unrelated changes
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or `.env*` files committed
- [ ] No hidden owner powers / rug vectors introduced; keeps the "Made by proofofpotato.com" credit
- [ ] Description explains the *why*, not just the *what*

<!-- Tricky bits, tradeoffs, things you're unsure about. -->
